generated_oml:
instance CraneControllerSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within the crane control system measuring position, velocity, and load"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneControllerSensors
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state data of the gantry crane including position, velocity, and load measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication, MQTTBroker
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for storing historical crane state data"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Application that logs crane state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating real-time data transmission between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for deployment and dissemination of digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub version control for digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for visualization and description of the lab-scale gantry crane digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4ModelEnabler
]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C4 Model-based visualization and description enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for educational and research purposes"
    base:contains GantryCraneStructure, CraneController, TimescaleDB
]

instance GantryCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control system of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalCraneControlAction, FaultDetectionAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for system performance tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLoggingInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure alignment between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAlignmentValidationInsight, ValidationOfNewTechniquesInsight, SystemEvolutionStudiesInsight
]

instance OptimalCraneControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal control action for crane movement and positioning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Fault detection for system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for performance tracking"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane operational status"
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization of crane state data"
]

instance ModelAlignmentValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of alignment between physical and digital models"
]

instance ValidationOfNewTechniquesInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of new digital twin techniques"
]

instance SystemEvolutionStudiesInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System evolution studies for methodology validation"
]

instance ScenarioAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Scenario analysis for decision-making support"
]

instance ForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasting capabilities for system performance"
]

instance VirusSpreadPreventionDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Decision-making for virus spread prevention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application (Python) are sent via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which executes them on the hardware. Trajectory Generator Service provides movement trajectories for the Control Application. Specific command formats, validation, authentication, and feedback mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs AutomationML for digital twin modeling, integrates Raspberry Pi sensor data with Microsoft Azure cloud services for pipeline implementation, and uses containerization for deployment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system utilizes an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication among containers, with services exchanging data via MQTT. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Uses AutomationML as an interoperability standard and Microsoft Azure tools for cloud-based data exchange with external systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar implements the AutomationML standard [14] for digital twin modeling and utilizes Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline implementation."
]
